title: uri_no_path test name misleading — test has a path
description: fn uri_no_path tests 'secretx:wolfhsm:my-key' which has path='my-key'. The name says 'no path' but the test has a path. Rename to uri_single_segment_path. Optionally add a separate uri_empty_path test for 'secretx:wolfhsm:' to verify the empty-path case is accepted.
